Parameter.Name: AuthenticationErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: An authentication error occurred while communicating with the ticketing system. Please check the connection details settings

Parameter.Name: ConnectionErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: A connection error occurred while communicating with the ticketing system. Please check the communication settings.

Parameter.Name: AllowedIncidentTicketStates
Parameter.Value: New | In Progress | Closed | Cancelled | On Hold | Resolved | Assigned

Parameter.Name: IncidentTicketStateErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID state is not allowed.

Parameter.Name: AllowedChangeTicketStates
Parameter.Value: new | Pending | Draft | In Progress | Closed | Closed Complete | Closed Incomplete | Closed | Cancelled | Closed Rejected | Closed Skipped | On Hold | Awaiting Approval | Approved | Rejected | Implemented | Assigned| CAB Review

Parameter.Name: ChangeTicketStateErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID state is not allowed.

Parameter.Name: ChangeTicketTimeframeErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This account cannot be used now. It can only be used during the timeframe specified in the ticket ID details.

Parameter.Name: AllowedChangeTicketApprovalStatuses
Parameter.Value: Approved | Not Yet Requested | Requested | Rejected

Parameter.Name: ChangeTicketApprovalStatusErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket approval status is not allowed.

Parameter.Name: TicketNotExistErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID does not exist.

Parameter.Name: TicketFormatErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket format is not valid.

Parameter.Name: AuthenticationErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: An authentication error occurred while communicating with the ticketing system. Please check the connection details settings

Parameter.Name: ConnectionErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: A connection error occurred while communicating with the ticketing system. Please check the communication settings.

Parameter.Name: AllowedIncidentTicketStates
Parameter.Value: New | Assigned | In Progress | Pending | Resolved | Closed | Cancelled

Parameter.Name: IncidentTicketStateErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID state is not allowed.

Parameter.Name: AllowedChangeTicketStates
Parameter.Value: Draft | Request For Authorization | Request For Change | Planning In Progress | Scheduled For Review | Scheduled For Approval | Scheduled | Implementation In Progress | Completed | Closed | Pending | Rejected | Cancelled

Parameter.Name: ChangeTicketStateErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID state is not allowed.

Parameter.Name: ChangeTicketTimeframeErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This account cannot be used now. It can only be used during the timeframe specified in the ticket ID details.

Parameter.Name: TicketNotExistErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket ID does not exist.

Parameter.Name: TicketFormatErrorMessage
Parameter.Value: This ticket format is not valid.
